title: senecio phalacrolaenus
intro: Senecio phalacrolaenus, also known as woolly groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Senecio phalacrolaenus is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and poultices for its medicinal use.
